news.title: LITE Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y, Shares Drop

news.title: Lumentum Holdings (NASDAQ:LITE) Shines in Louis Navellier’s Little Book Growth Screen
news.summary: Lumentum Holdings (LITE) meets eight core growth investing rules from Louis Navellier’s *The Little Book That Makes You Rich*, showing strong earnings surprises, sales growth, and high ROE, though valuation remains high.

news.title: How The Lumentum Holdings (LITE) Narrative Is Shifting With Nvidia Deal And AI Demand
news.summary: Lumentum Holdings just saw its modeled fair value estimate move from US$773.35 to US$904.89, a change of about 17% that puts a brighter spotlight on where analysts think the stock might be heading over the long term. That shift is coming alongside fresh Street research, higher price targets from several firms, and renewed attention on the company after new customer commitments and sector updates.
